name: PAX Grinder
summary: Enhance your grinding experience with the official 3-piece PAX Grinder.
description: Enhance your grinding experience with the official 3-piece PAX Grinder. Made from durable aluminium alloy, its magnetic closure guarantees a secure seal and its ergonomic design offers a comfortable grip. This expertly crafted grinder provides a consistent, medium-coarse grind perfectly suited for joint rolling, bowl packing, and other purposes. Dimensions : 2.5"L x 2.5"W x 1.77"H A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
